name: Baja Chicken Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Sour Cream or Plain Yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chicken breast until fully cooked and serve it raw.
2. Prepare the dried mixed fruit according to package instructions, using about 1 6-oz package for a total of approximately 1 1/2 cups.
3. Cook or reheat the macaroni or orzo until al dente, then drain well.
4. Cube the jicama and slice the green onions/tops.
5. In a large bowl, combine the cooked chicken, mixed fruit, macaroni, jicama, and green onion slices.
6. Add the mayonnaise or salad dressing, sour cream or plain yogurt, red chiles, and salt to the bowl.
7. Mix gently until all ingredients are well combined.
8. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
9. Serve chilled.
